69	@dataclass(frozen=True)
70	class SchedulerConfig:
71	    ingest_interval_s: int = 900
72	    generate_interval_s: int = 600
73	    resolution_poll_interval_s: int = 300
74	    paper_bet_drain_interval_s: int = 60
75	    article_interval_s: int = 3600
76	    public_calibration_interval_s: int = DEFAULT_PUBLIC_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S
77	    recalibration_interval_s: int = DEFAULT_RECALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S
78	    status_file: Path = Path("/var/lib/theseus/forecasts_status.json")
79	    budget_file: Path = DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH
80	    max_predictions_per_cycle: int = 8
81	    max_articles_per_week: int = DEFAULT_WEEKLY_ARTICLE_CAP
82	
83	    @classmethod
84	    def from_env(cls) -> "SchedulerConfig":
85	        data_dir = os.environ.get("NOOSPHERE_DATA_DIR", "").strip()
86	        default_budget = (
87	            Path(data_dir) / "forecasts_budget.json"
88	            if data_dir
89	            else DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH
90	        )
91	        return cls(
92	            ingest_interval_s=_env_seconds("FORECASTS_INGEST_INTERVAL_S", cls.ingest_interval_s),
93	            generate_interval_s=_env_seconds(
94	                "FORECASTS_GENERATE_INTERVAL_S",
95	                cls.generate_interval_s,
96	            ),
97	            resolution_poll_interval_s=_env_seconds(
98	                "FORECASTS_RESOLUTION_POLL_INTERVAL_S",
99	                cls.resolution_poll_interval_s,
100	            ),
101	            paper_bet_drain_interval_s=_env_seconds(
102	                "FORECASTS_PAPER_BET_DRAIN_INTERVAL_S",
103	                cls.paper_bet_drain_interval_s,
104	            ),
105	            article_interval_s=_env_seconds(
106	                "FORECASTS_ARTICLE_INTERVAL_S",
107	                cls.article_interval_s,
108	            ),
109	            public_calibration_interval_s=_env_seconds(
110	                "FORECASTS_PUBLIC_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S",
111	                cls.public_calibration_interval_s,
112	            ),
113	            recalibration_interval_s=_env_seconds(
114	                "FORECASTS_RECALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S",
115	                cls.recalibration_interval_s,
116	            ),
117	            status_file=status_path_from_env(),
118	            budget_file=Path(os.environ.get("FORECASTS_BUDGET_PATH", "").strip() or default_budget),
119	            max_predictions_per_cycle=_env_int(
120	                "FORECASTS_MAX_PREDICTIONS_PER_CYCLE",
121	                cls.max_predictions_per_cycle,
122	            ),
123	            max_articles_per_week=_env_nonnegative_int(
124	                "NOOSPHERE_ARTICLES_WEEKLY_CAP",
125	                cls.max_articles_per_week,
126	            ),
127	        )

154	@dataclass(frozen=True)
155	class _PortfolioSnapshot:
156	    kill_switch_engaged: bool
157	    kill_switch_reason: str | None
158	    paper_balance_usd: float
159	    live_balance_usd: float
160	    live_trading_enabled: bool
161	
162	
163	def _env_seconds(key: str, default: int) -> Any:
164	    raw = os.environ.get(key, "").strip()
165	    if not raw:
166	        return default
167	    value = float(raw)
168	    return int(value) if value.is_integer() else value
169	
170	
171	def _env_int(key: str, default: int) -> int:
172	    raw = os.environ.get(key, "").strip()
173	    if not raw:
174	        return default
175	    return int(raw)
176	
177	
178	def _env_nonnegative_int(key: str, default: int) -> int:
179	    raw = os.environ.get(key, "").strip()
180	    if not raw:
181	        return default
182	    try:
183	        value = int(raw)
184	    except ValueError:
185	        return default
186	    if value < 0:
187	        return default
188	    return value
189	
190	
191	def _organization_id() -> str:
192	    return (
193	        os.environ.get("FORECASTS_ORG_ID", "").strip()
194	        or os.environ.get("FORECASTS_INGEST_ORG_ID", "").strip()
195	    )
196	
197	
198	def _enum_value(value: Any) -> str:
199	    return str(value.value if hasattr(value, "value") else value)
200	
201	
202	def _utcnow() -> datetime:
203	    return datetime.now(timezone.utc)
204	
205	
206	def _as_utc(value: datetime) -> datetime:
207	    if value.tzinfo is None:
208	        return value.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
209	    return value.astimezone(timezone.utc)
210	
211	
212	def _money_float(value: Any) -> float:
213	    if value is None:
214	        return 0.0
215	    return float(Decimal(str(value)).quantize(Decimal("0.01")))
216	
217	
218	def _portfolio_snapshot(store: Store) -> _PortfolioSnapshot:
219	    org_id = _organization_id()
220	    with store.session() as session:
221	        stmt = select(ForecastPortfolioState)
222	        if org_id:
223	            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastPortfolioState.organization_id == org_id)
224	        state = session.exec(
225	            stmt.order_by(desc(ForecastPortfolioState.updated_at)).limit(1)
226	        ).first()
227	
228	    live_enabled = (
229	        os.environ.get("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower()
230	        == "true"
231	    )
232	    if state is None:
233	        return _PortfolioSnapshot(
234	            kill_switch_engaged=False,
235	            kill_switch_reason=None,
236	            paper_balance_usd=_money_float(DEFAULT_INITIAL_BALANCE),
237	            live_balance_usd=0.0,
238	            live_trading_enabled=live_enabled,
239	        )
240	    return _PortfolioSnapshot(
241	        kill_switch_engaged=bool(state.kill_switch_engaged),
242	        kill_switch_reason=state.kill_switch_reason,
243	        paper_balance_usd=_money_float(state.paper_balance_usd),
244	        live_balance_usd=_money_float(state.live_balance_usd),
245	        live_trading_enabled=live_enabled,
246	    )
247	
248	
249	def _open_markets(store: Store) -> int:
250	    org_id = _organization_id()
251	    with store.session() as session:
252	        stmt = select(ForecastMarket.id).where(
253	            ForecastMarket.status == ForecastMarketStatus.OPEN.value
254	        )
255	        if org_id:
256	            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastMarket.organization_id == org_id)
257	        return len(list(session.exec(stmt).all()))
258	
259	
260	def _predictions_this_hour(store: Store, now: datetime) -> int:
261	    org_id = _organization_id()
262	    hour_start = now.replace(minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
263	    with store.session() as session:
264	        stmt = select(ForecastPrediction).where(
265	            ForecastPrediction.status == ForecastPredictionStatus.PUBLISHED.value
266	        )
267	        if org_id:
268	            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastPrediction.organization_id == org_id)
269	        rows = list(
270	            session.exec(
271	                stmt.order_by(desc(ForecastPrediction.created_at)).limit(500)
272	            ).all()
273	        )
274	    return sum(
275	        1
276	        for row in rows
277	        if isinstance(row.created_at, datetime)
278	        and _as_utc(row.created_at) >= hour_start
279	    )
280	
281	
282	def _status_payload(store: Store, state: SchedulerState) -> dict[str, Any]:
283	    now = _utcnow()
284	    portfolio = _portfolio_snapshot(store)
285	    return {
286	        "ts": now.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z"),
287	        "kill_switch_engaged": portfolio.kill_switch_engaged,
288	        "kill_switch_reason": portfolio.kill_switch_reason,
289	        "last_ingest_ts": state.last_ingest_ts,
290	        "last_generate_ts": state.last_generate_ts,
291	        "last_resolve_ts": state.last_resolve_ts,
292	        "last_article_ts": state.last_article_ts,
293	        "last_public_calibration_ts": state.last_public_calibration_ts,
294	        "last_public_calibration_hash": state.last_public_calibration_hash,
295	        "last_recalibration_ts": state.last_recalibration_ts,
296	        "last_recalibration_models_written": state.last_recalibration_models_written,
297	        "paper_balance_usd": portfolio.paper_balance_usd,
298	        "live_balance_usd": portfolio.live_balance_usd,
299	        "live_trading_enabled": portfolio.live_trading_enabled,
300	        "open_markets": _open_markets(store),
301	        "predictions_this_hour": _predictions_this_hour(store, now),
302	    }
303	
304	
305	async def _write_status(
306	    store: Store,
307	    state: SchedulerState,
308	    *,
309	    config: SchedulerConfig,
310	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
311	) -> dict[str, Any]:
312	    async with status_lock:
313	        payload = _status_payload(store, state)
314	        write_status(payload, config.status_file)
315	        return payload
316	
317	
318	def _log_tick(report: TickReport) -> None:
319	    log.info("forecasts_scheduler_tick", **asdict(report))
320	
321	
322	async def _sleep_or_stop(seconds: float, stop_event: asyncio.Event) -> None:
323	    if seconds <= 0 or stop_event.is_set():
324	        return
325	    try:
326	        await asyncio.wait_for(stop_event.wait(), timeout=seconds)
327	    except TimeoutError:
328	        return
329	
330	
331	async def _tick_ingest(
332	    store: Store,
333	    *,
334	    config: SchedulerConfig,
335	    state: SchedulerState,
336	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
337	) -> TickReport:
338	    _ = config
339	    started = time.monotonic()
340	    started_at = utc_now_iso()
341	    errors: list[str] = []
342	    attempted = 0
343	    succeeded = 0
344	    skipped = 0
345	
346	    polymarket_cfg = PolymarketConfig.from_env()
347	    kalshi_cfg = KalshiConfig.from_env()
348	    for name, runner, cfg in (
349	        ("polymarket", ingest_polymarket_once, polymarket_cfg),
350	        ("kalshi", ingest_kalshi_once, kalshi_cfg),
351	    ):
352	        attempted += 1
353	        try:
354	            result = await runner(store, config=cfg)
355	        except Exception as exc:
356	            errors.append(f"{name}:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
357	            continue
358	        result_errors = list(getattr(result, "errors", []) or [])
359	        if result_errors and name == "kalshi" and set(result_errors) == {"KALSHI_NOT_CONFIGURED"}:
360	            skipped += 1
361	        elif result_errors:
362	            errors.extend(f"{name}:{error}" for error in result_errors)
363	            succeeded += 1
364	        else:
365	            succeeded += 1
366	
367	    state.last_ingest_ts = utc_now_iso()
368	    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
369	    return TickReport(
370	        loop="ingest",
371	        started_at=started_at,
372	        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
373	        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
374	        attempted=attempted,
375	        succeeded=succeeded,
376	        skipped=skipped,
377	        errors=tuple(errors),
378	    )
379	
380	
381	def _latest_published_prediction_for_market(
382	    store: Store,
383	    market_id: str,
384	) -> ForecastPrediction | None:
385	    with store.session() as session:
386	        return session.exec(
387	            select(ForecastPrediction)
388	            .where(ForecastPrediction.market_id == market_id)
389	            .where(ForecastPrediction.status == ForecastPredictionStatus.PUBLISHED.value)
390	            .order_by(desc(ForecastPrediction.created_at))
391	            .limit(1)
392	        ).first()
393	
394	
395	def _recent_prediction_window() -> timedelta:
396	    raw = os.environ.get("FORECASTS_RECENT_PREDICTION_WINDOW_S", "").strip()
397	    if not raw:
398	        return RECENT_PREDICTION_WINDOW
399	    return timedelta(seconds=max(0.0, float(raw)))
400	
401	
402	def _market_ids_to_generate(
403	    store: Store,
404	    *,
405	    max_predictions: int,
406	    now: datetime,
407	) -> list[str]:
408	    if max_predictions <= 0:
409	        return []
410	    org_id = _organization_id()
411	    with store.session() as session:
412	        stmt = select(ForecastMarket).where(
413	            ForecastMarket.status == ForecastMarketStatus.OPEN.value
414	        )
415	        if org_id:
416	            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastMarket.organization_id == org_id)
417	        markets = list(
418	            session.exec(
419	                stmt.order_by(asc(ForecastMarket.close_time), asc(ForecastMarket.created_at)).limit(
420	                    max(max_predictions * 10, max_predictions)
421	                )
422	            ).all()
423	        )
424	
425	    recent_after = now - _recent_prediction_window()
426	    selected: list[str] = []
427	    for market in markets:
428	        latest = _latest_published_prediction_for_market(store, market.id)
429	        if (
430	            latest is not None
431	            and isinstance(latest.created_at, datetime)
432	            and _as_utc(latest.created_at) >= recent_after
433	        ):
434	            continue
435	        selected.append(market.id)
436	        if len(selected) >= max_predictions:
437	            break
438	    return selected
439	
440	
441	async def _tick_generate(
442	    store: Store,
443	    *,
444	    config: SchedulerConfig,
445	    state: SchedulerState,
446	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
447	    budget: PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard,
448	) -> TickReport:
449	    started = time.monotonic()
450	    started_at = utc_now_iso()
451	    portfolio = _portfolio_snapshot(store)
452	    if portfolio.kill_switch_engaged:
453	        state.last_generate_ts = utc_now_iso()
454	        await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
455	        return TickReport(
456	            loop="generate",
457	            started_at=started_at,
458	            duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
459	            status="skipped_kill_switch",
460	            skipped=1,
461	        )
462	
463	    errors: list[str] = []
464	    published = 0
465	    skipped = 0
466	    attempted = 0
467	    market_ids = _market_ids_to_generate(
468	        store,
469	        max_predictions=config.max_predictions_per_cycle,
470	        now=_utcnow(),
471	    )
472	    for market_id in market_ids:
473	        attempted += 1
474	        try:
475	            outcome = await generate_forecast(store, market_id, budget=budget)
476	        except BudgetExhausted as exc:
477	            errors.append(f"market:{market_id}:BudgetExhausted: {exc}")
478	            break
479	        except Exception as exc:
480	            errors.append(f"market:{market_id}:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
481	            continue
482	        if _enum_value(outcome) == ForecastOutcome.PUBLISHED.value:
483	            published += 1
484	        else:
485	            skipped += 1
486	            if _enum_value(outcome) == ForecastOutcome.ABSTAINED_BUDGET.value:
487	                break
488	
489	    state.last_generate_ts = utc_now_iso()
490	    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
491	    return TickReport(
492	        loop="generate",
493	        started_at=started_at,
494	        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
495	        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
496	        attempted=attempted,
497	        succeeded=published,
498	        skipped=skipped,
499	        errors=tuple(errors),
500	    )
501	
502	
503	async def _tick_resolve(
504	    store: Store,
505	    *,
506	    config: SchedulerConfig,
507	    state: SchedulerState,
508	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
509	) -> TickReport:
510	    started = time.monotonic()
511	    started_at = utc_now_iso()
512	    errors: list[str] = []
513	    resolved = 0
514	    skipped = 0
515	    attempted = 0
516	    try:
517	        results = await poll_all_open(store)
518	    except Exception as exc:
519	        results = []
520	        errors.append(f"poll_all_open:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
521	
522	    for result in results:
523	        attempted += 1
524	        resolved += int(getattr(result, "resolved_predictions", 0) or 0)
525	        skipped += int(getattr(result, "skipped_predictions", 0) or 0)
526	        errors.extend(str(error) for error in (getattr(result, "errors", []) or []))
527	
528	    state.last_resolve_ts = utc_now_iso()
529	    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
530	    return TickReport(
531	        loop="resolve",
532	        started_at=started_at,
533	        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
534	        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
535	        attempted=attempted,
536	        succeeded=resolved,
537	        skipped=skipped,
538	        errors=tuple(errors),
539	    )
540	
541	
542	def _resolved_market_ids_with_open_paper_bets(store: Store) -> list[str]:
543	    with store.session() as session:
544	        rows = list(
545	            session.exec(
546	                select(ForecastMarket.id)
547	                .join(ForecastPrediction, ForecastPrediction.market_id == ForecastMarket.id)
548	                .join(ForecastBet, ForecastBet.prediction_id == ForecastPrediction.id)
549	                .where(ForecastMarket.resolved_outcome.is_not(None))
550	                .where(ForecastBet.mode == ForecastBetMode.PAPER.value)
551	                .where(ForecastBet.status == ForecastBetStatus.FILLED.value)
552	                .limit(1000)
553	            ).all()
554	        )
555	    return list(dict.fromkeys(str(row) for row in rows))
556	
557	
558	async def _tick_paper_drain(
559	    store: Store,
560	    *,
561	    config: SchedulerConfig,
562	    state: SchedulerState,
563	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
564	) -> TickReport:
565	    started = time.monotonic()
566	    started_at = utc_now_iso()
567	    settled = 0
568	    errors: list[str] = []
569	    market_ids = _resolved_market_ids_with_open_paper_bets(store)
570	    for market_id in market_ids:
571	        try:
572	            settled += await settle_paper_bets_for_market(store, market_id)
573	        except Exception as exc:
574	            errors.append(f"market:{market_id}:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
575	
576	    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
577	    return TickReport(
578	        loop="paper_drain",
579	        started_at=started_at,
580	        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
581	        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
582	        attempted=len(market_ids),
583	        succeeded=settled,
584	        errors=tuple(errors),
585	    )

588	def _publish_calibration_manifest_sync(
589	    store: Store,
590	    *,
591	    manifest_path: Path | None,
592	) -> tuple[str, int, str | None]:
593	    """Pull resolved-prediction rows, build the public calibration
594	    manifest, write it to disk atomically, and best-effort trigger a
595	    static-revalidation of the public page.
596	
597	    Pure-sync helper called from inside an executor so the async
598	    scheduler stays non-blocking. Returns ``(hash, sample_size,
599	    revalidate_status)``.
600	    """
601	
602	    org_id = _organization_id() or None
603	    with store.session() as session:
604	        connection = session.connection()
605	        cursor = connection.connection.cursor()
606	        try:
607	            rows = fetch_public_calibration_rows(
608	                cursor,
609	                organization_id=org_id,
610	            )
611	        finally:
612	            try:
613	                cursor.close()
614	            except Exception:
615	                pass
616	    manifest = build_public_calibration_manifest(rows)
617	    publish_public_calibration_manifest(manifest, path=manifest_path)
618	    revalidation = revalidate_public_calibration_page()
619	    revalidate_status: str | None
620	    if revalidation.get("ok"):
621	        revalidate_status = "revalidated"
622	    elif revalidation.get("skipped"):
623	        revalidate_status = "skipped"
624	    else:
625	        revalidate_status = f"failed:{revalidation.get('error', 'unknown')}"
626	    return (
627	        manifest.resolution_set_hash,
628	        manifest.counts.get("resolved_binary", 0),
629	        revalidate_status,
630	    )
631

633	async def _tick_public_calibration(
634	    store: Store,
635	    *,
636	    config: SchedulerConfig,
637	    state: SchedulerState,
638	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
639	    manifest_path: Path | None = None,
640	) -> TickReport:
641	    started = time.monotonic()
642	    started_at = utc_now_iso()
643	    errors: list[str] = []
644	    resolution_hash: str | None = None
645	    sample_size = 0
646	    revalidate_status: str | None = None
647	    try:
648	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
649	        resolution_hash, sample_size, revalidate_status = await loop.run_in_executor(
650	            None,
651	            lambda: _publish_calibration_manifest_sync(
652	                store, manifest_path=manifest_path
653	            ),
654	        )
655	    except Exception as exc:
656	        errors.append(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
657	
658	    if resolution_hash is not None:
659	        state.last_public_calibration_ts = utc_now_iso()
660	        state.last_public_calibration_hash = resolution_hash
661	    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
662	
663	    log.info(
664	        "forecasts_public_calibration_published",
665	        resolution_hash=resolution_hash,
666	        sample_size=sample_size,
667	        revalidate_status=revalidate_status,
668	    )
669	    return TickReport(
670	        loop="public_calibration",
671	        started_at=started_at,
672	        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
673	        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
674	        attempted=1,
675	        succeeded=1 if not errors else 0,
676	        errors=tuple(errors),
677	    )

679	
680	def _fit_recalibration_models_sync(store: Store) -> tuple[int, int]:
681	    """Pull resolved-prediction rows, fit a per-domain isotonic
682	    recalibrator, and write each fit as a new ``CalibrationModel`` row.
683	
684	    Returns ``(models_written, rows_considered)``. A return of (0, n)
685	    when n > 0 just means no domain crossed the sample-size threshold —
686	    the absence of a model row is the conservative-by-default signal
687	    the display layer keys off of.
688	    """
689	
690	    org_id = _organization_id() or None
691	    if not org_id:
692	        # No active organization scope — refuse to write rows that would
693	        # not pin to a tenant.
694	        return (0, 0)
695	    with store.session() as session:
696	        connection = session.connection()
697	        cursor = connection.connection.cursor()
698	        try:
699	            rows = fetch_public_calibration_rows(
700	                cursor,
701	                organization_id=org_id,
702	            )
703	            binary_rows: list[RecalibrationResolvedRow] = []
704	            for r in rows:
705	                if not r.is_binary_resolved():
706	                    continue
707	                if r.outcome not in {"YES", "NO"}:
708	                    continue
709	                if r.resolved_at is None or r.probability_yes is None:
710	                    continue
711	                binary_rows.append(
712	                    RecalibrationResolvedRow(
713	                        prediction_id=r.prediction_id,
714	                        domain=(r.domain or "").strip(),
715	                        probability_yes=float(r.probability_yes),
716	                        outcome=1 if r.outcome == "YES" else 0,
717	                        resolved_at=r.resolved_at,
718	                    )
719	                )
720	            written = fit_and_persist_recalibration_models(
721	                cursor,
722	                binary_rows,
723	                organization_id=org_id,
724	            )
725	            try:
726	                connection.connection.commit()
727	            except Exception:
728	                pass
729	        finally:
730	            try:
731	                cursor.close()
732	            except Exception:
733	                pass
734	    return (len(written), len(binary_rows))
735	
736	
737	async def _tick_recalibration(
738	    store: Store,
739	    *,
740	    config: SchedulerConfig,
741	    state: SchedulerState,
742	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
743	) -> TickReport:
744	    started = time.monotonic()
745	    started_at = utc_now_iso()
746	    errors: list[str] = []
747	    written = 0
748	    rows_considered = 0
749	    try:
750	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
751	        written, rows_considered = await loop.run_in_executor(
752	            None, lambda: _fit_recalibration_models_sync(store)
753	        )
754	    except Exception as exc:
755	        errors.append(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
756	
757	    if not errors:
758	        state.last_recalibration_ts = utc_now_iso()
759	        state.last_recalibration_models_written = written
760	    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
761	    log.info(
762	        "forecasts_recalibration_fit",
763	        models_written=written,
764	        rows_considered=rows_considered,
765	    )
766	    return TickReport(
767	        loop="recalibration",
768	        started_at=started_at,
769	        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
770	        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
771	        attempted=1,
772	        succeeded=1 if not errors else 0,
773	        errors=tuple(errors),
774	    )
775

777	async def _tick_articles(
778	    store: Store,
779	    *,
780	    config: SchedulerConfig,
781	    state: SchedulerState,
782	    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
783	    budget: PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard,

803	    return TickReport(

814	async def _guarded_tick(
815	    name: str,
816	    lock: asyncio.Lock,
817	    runner: Callable[[], Awaitable[TickReport]],
818	) -> TickReport:
819	    if lock.locked():
820	        report = TickReport(
821	            loop=name,
822	            started_at=utc_now_iso(),
823	            duration_ms=0,
824	            status="skipped_overlap",
825	            skipped=1,
826	        )
827	        _log_tick(report)
828	        return report
829	    async with lock:
830	        report = await runner()
831	        _log_tick(report)
832	        return report
833	
834	
835	async def _periodic_loop(
836	    name: str,
837	    interval_s: float,
838	    lock: asyncio.Lock,
839	    runner: Callable[[], Awaitable[TickReport]],
840	    stop_event: asyncio.Event,
841	) -> None:
842	    while not stop_event.is_set():
843	        tick_started = time.monotonic()
844	        try:
845	            await _guarded_tick(name, lock, runner)
846	        except Exception as exc:
847	            report = TickReport(
848	                loop=name,
849	                started_at=utc_now_iso(),
850	                duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - tick_started) * 1000),
851	                status="crashed",
852	                errors=(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}",),
853	            )
854	            _log_tick(report)
855	        elapsed = time.monotonic() - tick_started
856	        await _sleep_or_stop(max(0.0, float(interval_s) - elapsed), stop_event)
857	
858	
859	def _install_signal_handlers(stop_event: asyncio.Event) -> Callable[[], None]:
860	    running_loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
861	    installed: list[signal.Signals] = []
862	    previous: dict[signal.Signals, Any] = {}
863	    for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):
864	        try:
865	            running_loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)
866	            installed.append(sig)
867	        except (NotImplementedError, RuntimeError):
868	            previous[sig] = signal.getsignal(sig)
869	            signal.signal(
870	                sig,
871	                lambda _signum, _frame: running_loop.call_soon_threadsafe(
872	                    stop_event.set
873	                ),
874	            )
875	
876	    def _restore() -> None:
877	        for sig in installed:
878	            try:
879	                running_loop.remove_signal_handler(sig)
880	            except (NotImplementedError, RuntimeError, ValueError):
881	                pass
882	        for sig, handler in previous.items():
883	            signal.signal(sig, handler)
884	
885	    return _restore
886

888	async def run_once(store: Store, *, config: SchedulerConfig) -> dict[str, Any]:
889	    """Run each Forecasts scheduler sub-loop once and return the status payload."""
890	    state = SchedulerState()
891	    status_lock = asyncio.Lock()
892	    budget = PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard(config.budget_file)
893	    locks = {
894	        "ingest": asyncio.Lock(),
895	        "generate": asyncio.Lock(),
896	        "resolve": asyncio.Lock(),
897	        "paper_drain": asyncio.Lock(),
898	        "articles": asyncio.Lock(),
899	        "public_calibration": asyncio.Lock(),
900	        "recalibration": asyncio.Lock(),
901	    }
902	    runners: list[tuple[str, Callable[[], Awaitable[TickReport]]]] = [
903	        (
904	            "ingest",
905	            lambda: _tick_ingest(
906	                store,
907	                config=config,
908	                state=state,
909	                status_lock=status_lock,
910	            ),
911	        ),
912	        (
913	            "generate",
914	            lambda: _tick_generate(
915	                store,
916	                config=config,
917	                state=state,
918	                status_lock=status_lock,
919	                budget=budget,
920	            ),
921	        ),
922	        (
923	            "resolve",
924	            lambda: _tick_resolve(
925	                store,
926	                config=config,
927	                state=state,
928	                status_lock=status_lock,
929	            ),
930	        ),
931	        (
932	            "paper_drain",
933	            lambda: _tick_paper_drain(
934	                store,
935	                config=config,
936	                state=state,
937	                status_lock=status_lock,
938	            ),
939	        ),
940	        (
941	            "articles",
942	            lambda: _tick_articles(
943	                store,
944	                config=config,
945	                state=state,
946	                status_lock=status_lock,
947	                budget=budget,
948	            ),
949	        ),
950	        (
951	            "public_calibration",
952	            lambda: _tick_public_calibration(
953	                store,
954	                config=config,
955	                state=state,
956	                status_lock=status_lock,
957	            ),
958	        ),
959	        (
960	            "recalibration",
961	            lambda: _tick_recalibration(
962	                store,
963	                config=config,
964	                state=state,
965	                status_lock=status_lock,
966	            ),
967	        ),
968	    ]
969	    for name, runner in runners:
970	        await _guarded_tick(name, locks[name], runner)
971	    budget.save()
972	    return _status_payload(store, state)
973	
974	
975	async def run_forever(store: Store, *, config: SchedulerConfig) -> None:
976	    """
977	    Own independent Forecasts sub-loops and drain them on process signals.
978	    """
979	    stop_event = asyncio.Event()
980	    restore_signal_handlers = _install_signal_handlers(stop_event)
981	    state = SchedulerState()
982	    status_lock = asyncio.Lock()
983	    budget = PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard(config.budget_file)
984	    locks = {
985	        "ingest": asyncio.Lock(),
986	        "generate": asyncio.Lock(),
987	        "resolve": asyncio.Lock(),
988	        "paper_drain": asyncio.Lock(),
989	        "articles": asyncio.Lock(),
990	        "public_calibration": asyncio.Lock(),
991	        "recalibration": asyncio.Lock(),
992	    }
993	    tasks = [
994	        asyncio.create_task(
995	            _periodic_loop(
996	                "ingest",
997	                float(config.ingest_interval_s),
998	                locks["ingest"],
999	                lambda: _tick_ingest(
1000	                    store,
1001	                    config=config,
1002	                    state=state,
1003	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1004	                ),
1005	                stop_event,
1006	            ),
1007	            name="forecasts-ingest-loop",
1008	        ),
1009	        asyncio.create_task(
1010	            _periodic_loop(
1011	                "generate",
1012	                float(config.generate_interval_s),
1013	                locks["generate"],
1014	                lambda: _tick_generate(
1015	                    store,
1016	                    config=config,
1017	                    state=state,
1018	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1019	                    budget=budget,
1020	                ),
1021	                stop_event,
1022	            ),
1023	            name="forecasts-generate-loop",
1024	        ),
1025	        asyncio.create_task(
1026	            _periodic_loop(
1027	                "resolve",
1028	                float(config.resolution_poll_interval_s),
1029	                locks["resolve"],
1030	                lambda: _tick_resolve(
1031	                    store,
1032	                    config=config,
1033	                    state=state,
1034	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1035	                ),
1036	                stop_event,
1037	            ),
1038	            name="forecasts-resolve-loop",
1039	        ),
1040	        asyncio.create_task(
1041	            _periodic_loop(
1042	                "paper_drain",
1043	                float(config.paper_bet_drain_interval_s),
1044	                locks["paper_drain"],
1045	                lambda: _tick_paper_drain(
1046	                    store,
1047	                    config=config,
1048	                    state=state,
1049	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1050	                ),
1051	                stop_event,
1052	            ),
1053	            name="forecasts-paper-drain-loop",
1054	        ),
1055	        asyncio.create_task(
1056	            _periodic_loop(
1057	                "articles",
1058	                float(config.article_interval_s),
1059	                locks["articles"],
1060	                lambda: _tick_articles(
1061	                    store,
1062	                    config=config,
1063	                    state=state,
1064	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1065	                    budget=budget,
1066	                ),
1067	                stop_event,
1068	            ),
1069	            name="forecasts-articles-loop",
1070	        ),
1071	        asyncio.create_task(
1072	            _periodic_loop(
1073	                "public_calibration",
1074	                float(config.public_calibration_interval_s),
1075	                locks["public_calibration"],
1076	                lambda: _tick_public_calibration(
1077	                    store,
1078	                    config=config,
1079	                    state=state,
1080	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1081	                ),
1082	                stop_event,
1083	            ),
1084	            name="forecasts-public-calibration-loop",
1085	        ),
1086	        asyncio.create_task(
1087	            _periodic_loop(
1088	                "recalibration",
1089	                float(config.recalibration_interval_s),
1090	                locks["recalibration"],
1091	                lambda: _tick_recalibration(
1092	                    store,
1093	                    config=config,
1094	                    state=state,
1095	                    status_lock=status_lock,
1096	                ),
1097	                stop_event,
1098	            ),
1099	            name="forecasts-recalibration-loop",
1100	        ),
1101	    ]
1102	
1103	    log.info(
1104	        "forecasts_scheduler_started",
1105	        ingest_interval_s=config.ingest_interval_s,
1106	        generate_interval_s=config.generate_interval_s,
1107	        resolution_poll_interval_s=config.resolution_poll_interval_s,
1108	        paper_bet_drain_interval_s=config.paper_bet_drain_interval_s,
1109	        article_interval_s=config.article_interval_s,
1110	        public_calibration_interval_s=config.public_calibration_interval_s,
1111	        recalibration_interval_s=config.recalibration_interval_s,
1112	        status_file=str(config.status_file),
1113	        budget_file=str(config.budget_file),
1114	        max_predictions_per_cycle=config.max_predictions_per_cycle,
1115	        max_articles_per_week=config.max_articles_per_week,
1116	    )
1117	    try:
1118	        await stop_event.wait()
1119	    finally:
1120	        stop_event.set()
1121	        try:
1122	            await asyncio.wait_for(
1123	                asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True),
1124	                timeout=SHUTDOWN_GRACE_SECONDS,
1125	            )
1126	        except TimeoutError:
1127	            for task in tasks:
1128	                task.cancel()
1129	            await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
1130	        budget.save()
1131	        restore_signal_handlers()
1132	        log.info(
1133	            "forecasts_scheduler_stopped",
1134	            status_file=str(config.status_file),
1135	            budget_file=str(config.budget_file),
1136	        )
1137	
1138	
1139	def database_url_from_env() -> str:
1140	    explicit = os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL") or os.environ.get("THESEUS_DATABASE_URL")
1141	    if explicit:
1142	        return explicit
1143	    data_dir = os.environ.get("NOOSPHERE_DATA_DIR", "").strip()
1144	    if data_dir:
1145	        return f"sqlite:///{Path(data_dir) / 'noosphere.db'}"
1146	    return get_settings().database_url
1147	
1148	
1149	def _ensure_sqlite_parent(database_url: str) -> None:
1150	    url = make_url(database_url)
1151	    if not url.drivername.startswith("sqlite"):
1152	        return
1153	    database = url.database
1154	    if not database or database == ":memory:":
1155	        return
1156	    Path(database).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
1157	
1158	
1159	def _bootstrap_store() -> Store:
1160	    database_url = database_url_from_env()
1161	    _ensure_sqlite_parent(database_url)
1162	    return Store.from_database_url(database_url)
1163	
1164	
1165	def _configure_logging() -> None:
1166	    configure_logging(
1167	        level=os.environ.get("FORECASTS_LOG_LEVEL") or os.environ.get("LOG_LEVEL"),
1168	        json_format=True,
1169	        log_to_file=False,
1170	    )
1171	
1172	
1173	def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
1174	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="python -m noosphere.forecasts.scheduler")
1175	    parser.add_argument(
1176	        "command",
1177	        nargs="?",
1178	        choices=("run", "once"),
1179	        default="run",
1180	        help="run the scheduler loop or one tick per sub-loop",
1181	    )
1182	    parser.add_argument(
1183	        "--once",
1184	        action="store_true",
1185	        help="run one tick per sub-loop and exit",
1186	    )
1187	    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
1188	
1189	    _configure_logging()
1190	    from noosphere.forecasts.safety import current_trading_mode
1191	
1192	    log.info("forecasts_trading_mode", trading_mode=current_trading_mode())
1193	    store = _bootstrap_store()
1194	    config = SchedulerConfig.from_env()
1195	    if args.once or args.command == "once":
1196	        payload = asyncio.run(run_once(store, config=config))
1197	        print(json.dumps({"ok": True, "status": payload}, sort_keys=True))
1198	        return 0
1199	
1200	    asyncio.run(run_forever(store, config=config))
1201	    return 0
1202	
1203	
1204	if __name__ == "__main__":
1205	    raise SystemExit(main())
1206

file.content:
"""Standing Forecasts scheduler loop."""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import asyncio
import json
import os
import signal
import time
from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from decimal import Decimal
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Sequence

from sqlalchemy.engine import make_url
from sqlmodel import asc, desc, select

from noosphere.config import get_settings
from noosphere.currents.budget import BudgetExhausted
from noosphere.articles.triggers import (
    DEFAULT_WEEKLY_ARTICLE_CAP,
    dispatch_triggered_articles,
)
from noosphere.coherence.recalibration import (
    ResolvedRow as RecalibrationResolvedRow,

RECENT_PREDICTION_WINDOW = timedelta(hours=24)
SHUTDOWN_GRACE_SECONDS = 30.0
DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH = Path("/var/lib/theseus/forecasts_budget.json")
DEFAULT_PUBLIC_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S = 24 * 60 * 60  # nightly
DEFAULT_RECALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60  # weekly

log = get_logger(__name__)


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SchedulerConfig:
    ingest_interval_s: int = 900
    generate_interval_s: int = 600
    resolution_poll_interval_s: int = 300
    paper_bet_drain_interval_s: int = 60
    article_interval_s: int = 3600
    public_calibration_interval_s: int = DEFAULT_PUBLIC_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S
    recalibration_interval_s: int = DEFAULT_RECALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S
    status_file: Path = Path("/var/lib/theseus/forecasts_status.json")
    budget_file: Path = DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH
    max_predictions_per_cycle: int = 8
    max_articles_per_week: int = DEFAULT_WEEKLY_ARTICLE_CAP

    @classmethod
    def from_env(cls) -> "SchedulerConfig":
        data_dir = os.environ.get("NOOSPHERE_DATA_DIR", "").strip()
        default_budget = (
            Path(data_dir) / "forecasts_budget.json"
            if data_dir
            else DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH
        )
        return cls(
            ingest_interval_s=_env_seconds("FORECASTS_INGEST_INTERVAL_S", cls.ingest_interval_s),
            generate_interval_s=_env_seconds(
                "FORECASTS_GENERATE_INTERVAL_S",
                cls.generate_interval_s,
            ),
            resolution_poll_interval_s=_env_seconds(
                "FORECASTS_RESOLUTION_POLL_INTERVAL_S",
                cls.resolution_poll_interval_s,
            ),
            paper_bet_drain_interval_s=_env_seconds(
                "FORECASTS_PAPER_BET_DRAIN_INTERVAL_S",
                cls.paper_bet_drain_interval_s,
            ),
            article_interval_s=_env_seconds(
                "FORECASTS_ARTICLE_INTERVAL_S",
                cls.article_interval_s,
            ),
            public_calibration_interval_s=_env_seconds(
                "FORECASTS_PUBLIC_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S",
                cls.public_calibration_interval_s,
            ),
            recalibration_interval_s=_env_seconds(
                "FORECASTS_RECALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S",
                cls.recalibration_interval_s,
            ),
            status_file=status_path_from_env(),
            budget_file=Path(os.environ.get("FORECASTS_BUDGET_PATH", "").strip() or default_budget),
            max_predictions_per_cycle=_env_int(
                "FORECASTS_MAX_PREDICTIONS_PER_CYCLE",
                cls.max_predictions_per_cycle,
            ),
            max_articles_per_week=_env_nonnegative_int(
                "NOOSPHERE_ARTICLES_WEEKLY_CAP",
                cls.max_articles_per_week,
            ),
        )


@dataclass
class SchedulerState:
    last_ingest_ts: str | None = None
    last_generate_ts: str | None = None
    last_resolve_ts: str | None = None
    last_article_ts: str | None = None
    last_public_calibration_ts: str | None = None
    last_public_calibration_hash: str | None = None
    last_recalibration_ts: str | None = None
    last_recalibration_models_written: int = 0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TickReport:
    loop: str
    started_at: str
    duration_ms: int
    status: str
    attempted: int = 0
    succeeded: int = 0
    skipped: int = 0
    errors: tuple[str, ...] = ()


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class _PortfolioSnapshot:
    kill_switch_engaged: bool
    kill_switch_reason: str | None
    paper_balance_usd: float
    live_balance_usd: float
    live_trading_enabled: bool


def _env_seconds(key: str, default: int) -> Any:
    raw = os.environ.get(key, "").strip()
    if not raw:
        return default
    value = float(raw)
    return int(value) if value.is_integer() else value


def _env_int(key: str, default: int) -> int:
    raw = os.environ.get(key, "").strip()
    if not raw:
        return default
    return int(raw)


def _env_nonnegative_int(key: str, default: int) -> int:
    raw = os.environ.get(key, "").strip()
    if not raw:
        return default
    try:
        value = int(raw)
    except ValueError:
        return default
    if value < 0:
        return default
    return value


def _organization_id() -> str:
    return (
        os.environ.get("FORECASTS_ORG_ID", "").strip()
        or os.environ.get("FORECASTS_INGEST_ORG_ID", "").strip()
    )


def _enum_value(value: Any) -> str:
    return str(value.value if hasattr(value, "value") else value)


def _utcnow() -> datetime:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc)


def _as_utc(value: datetime) -> datetime:
    if value.tzinfo is None:
        return value.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    return value.astimezone(timezone.utc)


def _money_float(value: Any) -> float:
    if value is None:
        return 0.0
    return float(Decimal(str(value)).quantize(Decimal("0.01")))


def _portfolio_snapshot(store: Store) -> _PortfolioSnapshot:
    org_id = _organization_id()
    with store.session() as session:
        stmt = select(ForecastPortfolioState)
        if org_id:
            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastPortfolioState.organization_id == org_id)
        state = session.exec(
            stmt.order_by(desc(ForecastPortfolioState.updated_at)).limit(1)
        ).first()

    live_enabled = (
        os.environ.get("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower()
        == "true"
    )
    if state is None:
        return _PortfolioSnapshot(
            kill_switch_engaged=False,
            kill_switch_reason=None,
            paper_balance_usd=_money_float(DEFAULT_INITIAL_BALANCE),
            live_balance_usd=0.0,
            live_trading_enabled=live_enabled,
        )
    return _PortfolioSnapshot(
        kill_switch_engaged=bool(state.kill_switch_engaged),
        kill_switch_reason=state.kill_switch_reason,
        paper_balance_usd=_money_float(state.paper_balance_usd),
        live_balance_usd=_money_float(state.live_balance_usd),
        live_trading_enabled=live_enabled,
    )


def _open_markets(store: Store) -> int:
    org_id = _organization_id()
    with store.session() as session:
        stmt = select(ForecastMarket.id).where(
            ForecastMarket.status == ForecastMarketStatus.OPEN.value
        )
        if org_id:
            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastMarket.organization_id == org_id)
        return len(list(session.exec(stmt).all()))


def _predictions_this_hour(store: Store, now: datetime) -> int:
    org_id = _organization_id()
    hour_start = now.replace(minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
    with store.session() as session:
        stmt = select(ForecastPrediction).where(
            ForecastPrediction.status == ForecastPredictionStatus.PUBLISHED.value
        )
        if org_id:
            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastPrediction.organization_id == org_id)
        rows = list(
            session.exec(
                stmt.order_by(desc(ForecastPrediction.created_at)).limit(500)
            ).all()
        )
    return sum(
        1
        for row in rows
        if isinstance(row.created_at, datetime)
        and _as_utc(row.created_at) >= hour_start
    )


def _status_payload(store: Store, state: SchedulerState) -> dict[str, Any]:
    now = _utcnow()
    portfolio = _portfolio_snapshot(store)
    return {
        "ts": now.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace("+00:00", "Z"),
        "kill_switch_engaged": portfolio.kill_switch_engaged,
        "kill_switch_reason": portfolio.kill_switch_reason,
        "last_ingest_ts": state.last_ingest_ts,
        "last_generate_ts": state.last_generate_ts,
        "last_resolve_ts": state.last_resolve_ts,
        "last_article_ts": state.last_article_ts,
        "last_public_calibration_ts": state.last_public_calibration_ts,
        "last_public_calibration_hash": state.last_public_calibration_hash,
        "last_recalibration_ts": state.last_recalibration_ts,
        "last_recalibration_models_written": state.last_recalibration_models_written,
        "paper_balance_usd": portfolio.paper_balance_usd,
        "live_balance_usd": portfolio.live_balance_usd,
        "live_trading_enabled": portfolio.live_trading_enabled,
        "open_markets": _open_markets(store),
        "predictions_this_hour": _predictions_this_hour(store, now),
    }


async def _write_status(
    store: Store,
    state: SchedulerState,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    async with status_lock:
        payload = _status_payload(store, state)
        write_status(payload, config.status_file)
        return payload


def _log_tick(report: TickReport) -> None:
    log.info("forecasts_scheduler_tick", **asdict(report))


async def _sleep_or_stop(seconds: float, stop_event: asyncio.Event) -> None:
    if seconds <= 0 or stop_event.is_set():
        return
    try:
        await asyncio.wait_for(stop_event.wait(), timeout=seconds)
    except TimeoutError:
        return


async def _tick_ingest(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
) -> TickReport:
    _ = config
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    errors: list[str] = []
    attempted = 0
    succeeded = 0
    skipped = 0

    polymarket_cfg = PolymarketConfig.from_env()
    kalshi_cfg = KalshiConfig.from_env()
    for name, runner, cfg in (
        ("polymarket", ingest_polymarket_once, polymarket_cfg),
        ("kalshi", ingest_kalshi_once, kalshi_cfg),
    ):
        attempted += 1
        try:
            result = await runner(store, config=cfg)
        except Exception as exc:
            errors.append(f"{name}:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
            continue
        result_errors = list(getattr(result, "errors", []) or [])
        if result_errors and name == "kalshi" and set(result_errors) == {"KALSHI_NOT_CONFIGURED"}:
            skipped += 1
        elif result_errors:
            errors.extend(f"{name}:{error}" for error in result_errors)
            succeeded += 1
        else:
            succeeded += 1

    state.last_ingest_ts = utc_now_iso()
    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
    return TickReport(
        loop="ingest",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        attempted=attempted,
        succeeded=succeeded,
        skipped=skipped,
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


def _latest_published_prediction_for_market(
    store: Store,
    market_id: str,
) -> ForecastPrediction | None:
    with store.session() as session:
        return session.exec(
            select(ForecastPrediction)
            .where(ForecastPrediction.market_id == market_id)
            .where(ForecastPrediction.status == ForecastPredictionStatus.PUBLISHED.value)
            .order_by(desc(ForecastPrediction.created_at))
            .limit(1)
        ).first()


def _recent_prediction_window() -> timedelta:
    raw = os.environ.get("FORECASTS_RECENT_PREDICTION_WINDOW_S", "").strip()
    if not raw:
        return RECENT_PREDICTION_WINDOW
    return timedelta(seconds=max(0.0, float(raw)))


def _market_ids_to_generate(
    store: Store,
    *,
    max_predictions: int,
    now: datetime,
) -> list[str]:
    if max_predictions <= 0:
        return []
    org_id = _organization_id()
    with store.session() as session:
        stmt = select(ForecastMarket).where(
            ForecastMarket.status == ForecastMarketStatus.OPEN.value
        )
        if org_id:
            stmt = stmt.where(ForecastMarket.organization_id == org_id)
        markets = list(
            session.exec(
                stmt.order_by(asc(ForecastMarket.close_time), asc(ForecastMarket.created_at)).limit(
                    max(max_predictions * 10, max_predictions)
                )
            ).all()
        )

    recent_after = now - _recent_prediction_window()
    selected: list[str] = []
    for market in markets:
        latest = _latest_published_prediction_for_market(store, market.id)
        if (
            latest is not None
            and isinstance(latest.created_at, datetime)
            and _as_utc(latest.created_at) >= recent_after
        ):
            continue
        selected.append(market.id)
        if len(selected) >= max_predictions:
            break
    return selected


async def _tick_generate(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
    budget: PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard,
) -> TickReport:
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    portfolio = _portfolio_snapshot(store)
    if portfolio.kill_switch_engaged:
        state.last_generate_ts = utc_now_iso()
        await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
        return TickReport(
            loop="generate",
            started_at=started_at,
            duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
            status="skipped_kill_switch",
            skipped=1,
        )

    errors: list[str] = []
    published = 0
    skipped = 0
    attempted = 0
    market_ids = _market_ids_to_generate(
        store,
        max_predictions=config.max_predictions_per_cycle,
        now=_utcnow(),
    )
    for market_id in market_ids:
        attempted += 1
        try:
            outcome = await generate_forecast(store, market_id, budget=budget)
        except BudgetExhausted as exc:
            errors.append(f"market:{market_id}:BudgetExhausted: {exc}")
            break
        except Exception as exc:
            errors.append(f"market:{market_id}:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
            continue
        if _enum_value(outcome) == ForecastOutcome.PUBLISHED.value:
            published += 1
        else:
            skipped += 1
            if _enum_value(outcome) == ForecastOutcome.ABSTAINED_BUDGET.value:
                break

    state.last_generate_ts = utc_now_iso()
    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
    return TickReport(
        loop="generate",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        attempted=attempted,
        succeeded=published,
        skipped=skipped,
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


async def _tick_resolve(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
) -> TickReport:
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    errors: list[str] = []
    resolved = 0
    skipped = 0
    attempted = 0
    try:
        results = await poll_all_open(store)
    except Exception as exc:
        results = []
        errors.append(f"poll_all_open:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")

    for result in results:
        attempted += 1
        resolved += int(getattr(result, "resolved_predictions", 0) or 0)
        skipped += int(getattr(result, "skipped_predictions", 0) or 0)
        errors.extend(str(error) for error in (getattr(result, "errors", []) or []))

    state.last_resolve_ts = utc_now_iso()
    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
    return TickReport(
        loop="resolve",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        attempted=attempted,
        succeeded=resolved,
        skipped=skipped,
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


def _resolved_market_ids_with_open_paper_bets(store: Store) -> list[str]:
    with store.session() as session:
        rows = list(
            session.exec(
                select(ForecastMarket.id)
                .join(ForecastPrediction, ForecastPrediction.market_id == ForecastMarket.id)
                .join(ForecastBet, ForecastBet.prediction_id == ForecastPrediction.id)
                .where(ForecastMarket.resolved_outcome.is_not(None))
                .where(ForecastBet.mode == ForecastBetMode.PAPER.value)
                .where(ForecastBet.status == ForecastBetStatus.FILLED.value)
                .limit(1000)
            ).all()
        )
    return list(dict.fromkeys(str(row) for row in rows))


async def _tick_paper_drain(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
) -> TickReport:
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    settled = 0
    errors: list[str] = []
    market_ids = _resolved_market_ids_with_open_paper_bets(store)
    for market_id in market_ids:
        try:
            settled += await settle_paper_bets_for_market(store, market_id)
        except Exception as exc:
            errors.append(f"market:{market_id}:{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")

    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
    return TickReport(
        loop="paper_drain",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        attempted=len(market_ids),
        succeeded=settled,
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


def _publish_calibration_manifest_sync(
    store: Store,
    *,
    manifest_path: Path | None,
) -> tuple[str, int, str | None]:
    """Pull resolved-prediction rows, build the public calibration
    manifest, write it to disk atomically, and best-effort trigger a
    static-revalidation of the public page.

    Pure-sync helper called from inside an executor so the async
    scheduler stays non-blocking. Returns ``(hash, sample_size,
    revalidate_status)``.
    """

    org_id = _organization_id() or None
    with store.session() as session:
        connection = session.connection()
        cursor = connection.connection.cursor()
        try:
            rows = fetch_public_calibration_rows(
                cursor,
                organization_id=org_id,
            )
        finally:
            try:
                cursor.close()
            except Exception:
                pass
    manifest = build_public_calibration_manifest(rows)
    publish_public_calibration_manifest(manifest, path=manifest_path)
    revalidation = revalidate_public_calibration_page()
    revalidate_status: str | None
    if revalidation.get("ok"):
        revalidate_status = "revalidated"
    elif revalidation.get("skipped"):
        revalidate_status = "skipped"
    else:
        revalidate_status = f"failed:{revalidation.get('error', 'unknown')}"
    return (
        manifest.resolution_set_hash,
        manifest.counts.get("resolved_binary", 0),
        revalidate_status,
    )


async def _tick_public_calibration(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
    manifest_path: Path | None = None,
) -> TickReport:
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    errors: list[str] = []
    resolution_hash: str | None = None
    sample_size = 0
    revalidate_status: str | None = None
    try:
        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
        resolution_hash, sample_size, revalidate_status = await loop.run_in_executor(
            None,
            lambda: _publish_calibration_manifest_sync(
                store, manifest_path=manifest_path
            ),
        )
    except Exception as exc:
        errors.append(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")

    if resolution_hash is not None:
        state.last_public_calibration_ts = utc_now_iso()
        state.last_public_calibration_hash = resolution_hash
    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)

    log.info(
        "forecasts_public_calibration_published",
        resolution_hash=resolution_hash,
        sample_size=sample_size,
        revalidate_status=revalidate_status,
    )
    return TickReport(
        loop="public_calibration",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        attempted=1,
        succeeded=1 if not errors else 0,
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


def _fit_recalibration_models_sync(store: Store) -> tuple[int, int]:
    """Pull resolved-prediction rows, fit a per-domain isotonic
    recalibrator, and write each fit as a new ``CalibrationModel`` row.

    Returns ``(models_written, rows_considered)``. A return of (0, n)
    when n > 0 just means no domain crossed the sample-size threshold —
    the absence of a model row is the conservative-by-default signal
    the display layer keys off of.
    """

    org_id = _organization_id() or None
    if not org_id:
        # No active organization scope — refuse to write rows that would
        # not pin to a tenant.
        return (0, 0)
    with store.session() as session:
        connection = session.connection()
        cursor = connection.connection.cursor()
        try:
            rows = fetch_public_calibration_rows(
                cursor,
                organization_id=org_id,
            )
            binary_rows: list[RecalibrationResolvedRow] = []
            for r in rows:
                if not r.is_binary_resolved():
                    continue
                if r.outcome not in {"YES", "NO"}:
                    continue
                if r.resolved_at is None or r.probability_yes is None:
                    continue
                binary_rows.append(
                    RecalibrationResolvedRow(
                        prediction_id=r.prediction_id,
                        domain=(r.domain or "").strip(),
                        probability_yes=float(r.probability_yes),
                        outcome=1 if r.outcome == "YES" else 0,
                        resolved_at=r.resolved_at,
                    )
                )
            written = fit_and_persist_recalibration_models(
                cursor,
                binary_rows,
                organization_id=org_id,
            )
            try:
                connection.connection.commit()
            except Exception:
                pass
        finally:
            try:
                cursor.close()
            except Exception:
                pass
    return (len(written), len(binary_rows))


async def _tick_recalibration(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
) -> TickReport:
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    errors: list[str] = []
    written = 0
    rows_considered = 0
    try:
        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
        written, rows_considered = await loop.run_in_executor(
            None, lambda: _fit_recalibration_models_sync(store)
        )
    except Exception as exc:
        errors.append(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")

    if not errors:
        state.last_recalibration_ts = utc_now_iso()
        state.last_recalibration_models_written = written
    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
    log.info(
        "forecasts_recalibration_fit",
        models_written=written,
        rows_considered=rows_considered,
    )
    return TickReport(
        loop="recalibration",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        attempted=1,
        succeeded=1 if not errors else 0,
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


async def _tick_articles(
    store: Store,
    *,
    config: SchedulerConfig,
    state: SchedulerState,
    status_lock: asyncio.Lock,
    budget: PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard,
) -> TickReport:
    started = time.monotonic()
    started_at = utc_now_iso()
    errors: list[str] = []
    published = 0
    try:
        articles = await dispatch_triggered_articles(
            store,
            budget=budget,
            weekly_cap=config.max_articles_per_week,
        )
        published = len(articles)
    except BudgetExhausted as exc:
        errors.append(f"BudgetExhausted: {exc}")
    except Exception as exc:
        errors.append(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")

    state.last_article_ts = utc_now_iso()
    await _write_status(store, state, config=config, status_lock=status_lock)
    return TickReport(
        loop="articles",
        started_at=started_at,
        duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - started) * 1000),
        status="ok" if not errors else "error",
        succeeded=published,
        skipped=max(0, config.max_articles_per_week - published),
        errors=tuple(errors),
    )


async def _guarded_tick(
    name: str,
    lock: asyncio.Lock,
    runner: Callable[[], Awaitable[TickReport]],
) -> TickReport:
    if lock.locked():
        report = TickReport(
            loop=name,
            started_at=utc_now_iso(),
            duration_ms=0,
            status="skipped_overlap",
            skipped=1,
        )
        _log_tick(report)
        return report
    async with lock:
        report = await runner()
        _log_tick(report)
        return report


async def _periodic_loop(
    name: str,
    interval_s: float,
    lock: asyncio.Lock,
    runner: Callable[[], Awaitable[TickReport]],
    stop_event: asyncio.Event,
) -> None:
    while not stop_event.is_set():
        tick_started = time.monotonic()
        try:
            await _guarded_tick(name, lock, runner)
        except Exception as exc:
            report = TickReport(
                loop=name,
                started_at=utc_now_iso(),
                duration_ms=int((time.monotonic() - tick_started) * 1000),
                status="crashed",
                errors=(f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}",),
            )
            _log_tick(report)
        elapsed = time.monotonic() - tick_started
        await _sleep_or_stop(max(0.0, float(interval_s) - elapsed), stop_event)


def _install_signal_handlers(stop_event: asyncio.Event) -> Callable[[], None]:
    running_loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    installed: list[signal.Signals] = []
    previous: dict[signal.Signals, Any] = {}
    for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):
        try:
            running_loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)
            installed.append(sig)
        except (NotImplementedError, RuntimeError):
            previous[sig] = signal.getsignal(sig)
            signal.signal(
                sig,
                lambda _signum, _frame: running_loop.call_soon_threadsafe(
                    stop_event.set
                ),
            )

    def _restore() -> None:
        for sig in installed:
            try:
                running_loop.remove_signal_handler(sig)
            except (NotImplementedError, RuntimeError, ValueError):
                pass
        for sig, handler in previous.items():
            signal.signal(sig, handler)

    return _restore


async def run_once(store: Store, *, config: SchedulerConfig) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Run each Forecasts scheduler sub-loop once and return the status payload."""
    state = SchedulerState()
    status_lock = asyncio.Lock()
    budget = PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard(config.budget_file)
    locks = {
        "ingest": asyncio.Lock(),
        "generate": asyncio.Lock(),
        "resolve": asyncio.Lock(),
        "paper_drain": asyncio.Lock(),
        "articles": asyncio.Lock(),
        "public_calibration": asyncio.Lock(),
        "recalibration": asyncio.Lock(),
    }
    runners: list[tuple[str, Callable[[], Awaitable[TickReport]]]] = [
        (
            "ingest",
            lambda: _tick_ingest(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
            ),
        ),
        (
            "generate",
            lambda: _tick_generate(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
                budget=budget,
            ),
        ),
        (
            "resolve",
            lambda: _tick_resolve(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
            ),
        ),
        (
            "paper_drain",
            lambda: _tick_paper_drain(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
            ),
        ),
        (
            "articles",
            lambda: _tick_articles(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
                budget=budget,
            ),
        ),
        (
            "public_calibration",
            lambda: _tick_public_calibration(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
            ),
        ),
        (
            "recalibration",
            lambda: _tick_recalibration(
                store,
                config=config,
                state=state,
                status_lock=status_lock,
            ),
        ),
    ]
    for name, runner in runners:
        await _guarded_tick(name, locks[name], runner)
    budget.save()
    return _status_payload(store, state)


async def run_forever(store: Store, *, config: SchedulerConfig) -> None:
    """
    Own independent Forecasts sub-loops and drain them on process signals.
    """
    stop_event = asyncio.Event()
    restore_signal_handlers = _install_signal_handlers(stop_event)
    state = SchedulerState()
    status_lock = asyncio.Lock()
    budget = PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard(config.budget_file)
    locks = {
        "ingest": asyncio.Lock(),
        "generate": asyncio.Lock(),
        "resolve": asyncio.Lock(),
        "paper_drain": asyncio.Lock(),
        "articles": asyncio.Lock(),
        "public_calibration": asyncio.Lock(),
        "recalibration": asyncio.Lock(),
    }
    tasks = [
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "ingest",
                float(config.ingest_interval_s),
                locks["ingest"],
                lambda: _tick_ingest(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-ingest-loop",
        ),
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "generate",
                float(config.generate_interval_s),
                locks["generate"],
                lambda: _tick_generate(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                    budget=budget,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-generate-loop",
        ),
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "resolve",
                float(config.resolution_poll_interval_s),
                locks["resolve"],
                lambda: _tick_resolve(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-resolve-loop",
        ),
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "paper_drain",
                float(config.paper_bet_drain_interval_s),
                locks["paper_drain"],
                lambda: _tick_paper_drain(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-paper-drain-loop",
        ),
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "articles",
                float(config.article_interval_s),
                locks["articles"],
                lambda: _tick_articles(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                    budget=budget,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-articles-loop",
        ),
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "public_calibration",
                float(config.public_calibration_interval_s),
                locks["public_calibration"],
                lambda: _tick_public_calibration(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-public-calibration-loop",
        ),
        asyncio.create_task(
            _periodic_loop(
                "recalibration",
                float(config.recalibration_interval_s),
                locks["recalibration"],
                lambda: _tick_recalibration(
                    store,
                    config=config,
                    state=state,
                    status_lock=status_lock,
                ),
                stop_event,
            ),
            name="forecasts-recalibration-loop",
        ),
    ]

    log.info(
        "forecasts_scheduler_started",
        ingest_interval_s=config.ingest_interval_s,
        generate_interval_s=config.generate_interval_s,
        resolution_poll_interval_s=config.resolution_poll_interval_s,
        paper_bet_drain_interval_s=config.paper_bet_drain_interval_s,
        article_interval_s=config.article_interval_s,
        public_calibration_interval_s=config.public_calibration_interval_s,
        recalibration_interval_s=config.recalibration_interval_s,
        status_file=str(config.status_file),
        budget_file=str(config.budget_file),
        max_predictions_per_cycle=config.max_predictions_per_cycle,
        max_articles_per_week=config.max_articles_per_week,
    )
    try:
        await stop_event.wait()
    finally:
        stop_event.set()
        try:
            await asyncio.wait_for(
                asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True),
                timeout=SHUTDOWN_GRACE_SECONDS,
            )
        except TimeoutError:
            for task in tasks:
                task.cancel()
            await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
        budget.save()
        restore_signal_handlers()
        log.info(
            "forecasts_scheduler_stopped",
            status_file=str(config.status_file),
            budget_file=str(config.budget_file),
        )


def database_url_from_env() -> str:
    explicit = os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL") or os.environ.get("THESEUS_DATABASE_URL")
    if explicit:
        return explicit
    data_dir = os.environ.get("NOOSPHERE_DATA_DIR", "").strip()
    if data_dir:
        return f"sqlite:///{Path(data_dir) / 'noosphere.db'}"
    return get_settings().database_url


def _ensure_sqlite_parent(database_url: str) -> None:
    url = make_url(database_url)
    if not url.drivername.startswith("sqlite"):
        return
    database = url.database
    if not database or database == ":memory:":
        return
    Path(database).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)


def _bootstrap_store() -> Store:
    database_url = database_url_from_env()
    _ensure_sqlite_parent(database_url)
    return Store.from_database_url(database_url)


def _configure_logging() -> None:
    configure_logging(
        level=os.environ.get("FORECASTS_LOG_LEVEL") or os.environ.get("LOG_LEVEL"),
        json_format=True,
        log_to_file=False,
    )


def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="python -m noosphere.forecasts.scheduler")
    parser.add_argument(
        "command",
        nargs="?",
        choices=("run", "once"),
        default="run",
        help="run the scheduler loop or one tick per sub-loop",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--once",
        action="store_true",
        help="run one tick per sub-loop and exit",
    )
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)

    _configure_logging()
    from noosphere.forecasts.safety import current_trading_mode

    log.info("forecasts_trading_mode", trading_mode=current_trading_mode())
    store = _bootstrap_store()
    config = SchedulerConfig.from_env()
    if args.once or args.command == "once":
        payload = asyncio.run(run_once(store, config=config))
        print(json.dumps({"ok": True, "status": payload}, sort_keys=True))
        return 0

    asyncio.run(run_forever(store, config=config))
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
